assessor_raw:
## Baseline Assessment (Run 1): E-Commerce Search Ranking

Four issues: (1) Random session split across 18 months = temporal leakage; (2) Full-log preprocessing before split = preprocessing leakage; (3) Test set used to select boosting checkpoint during retrain = evaluation contamination; (4) Query-level AUROC as primary metric — search success is top-k; NDCG@10 is the appropriate primary metric.

Verdict: critique_wins
